visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens in a brightly lit Costco warehouse. A young woman with a light blue textured bucket hat and a white sweater under a blue denim dress holds a large clear plastic box of sandwiches. She is grinning widely, showing excitement, and gesturing towards the product with her free hand. Behind her are industrial refrigerated shelves and price markers. (2) A close-up shot focuses on the contents of the sandwich box. The platter contains neatly cut white bread sandwiches filled with egg salad, ham and cheese, and a thick layer of brown meat floss. The Costco Wholesale logo is superimposed at the top of the frame, and a yellow text bubble appears over the box. (3) The scene cuts to a home environment where the woman is sitting at a table next to a friend with dark hair in a purple top. The main character now wears a red Kangol brand hat. They are holding a meat floss sandwich close to the camera, showcasing the dense filling. The room is warmly lit with household items like toys in the background. (4) A top-down shot of the open sandwich platter resting on a grey countertop. The arrangement shows the variety of fillings clearly, including green lettuce, yellow egg, and pink ham. Hand movements from the two women point at specific sandwiches as they discuss the ingredients and textures. (5) The two women are shown again in a medium shot, looking directly into the camera and giving a thumbs-up. They continue to gesture towards the sandwich tray placed on the table in front of them, smiling and speaking with high energy.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Slogan]: 最後一盒. (2) [Subtitle]: 最後一盒 被我搶到. (3) [Variety]: 竟然是先被搶光的. (4) [Subtitle]: 最新新出 有肉鬆的綜合三明治. (5) [Subtitle]: 因為他們過去的 這個沙拉蛋啊. (6) [Subtitle]: 跟起司火腿絕對沒問題. (7) [Subtitle]: 可是肉鬆 肉鬆要嘛天堂要嘛地獄. (8) [Subtitle]: 我相信它是天堂 希望這盒不會讓我失望. (9) [Subtitle]: 291元. (10) [Subtitle]: 以前以為好市多的 那個三明治是 盤子才買. (11) [Variety]: 我超 爆開的肉鬆. (12) [Subtitle]: 好市多的綜合三明治 這次也非常值得買. (13) [Subtitle]: 它的豬肉鬆是給到 爆開整個盒子. (14) [Subtitle]: 你看 你都還可以沾其他的麵包. (15) [Subtitle]: 那這一次的豬肉鬆呢 它除了量很多之外. (16) [Subtitle]: 它上面下面的蛋皮 配的也非常的剛好. (17) [Subtitle]: 那火腿起司的話 這一次的煙燻火腿味道 真是香啊. (18) [Subtitle]: 煙燻味直接爆出來. (19) [Subtitle]: 那蛋沙拉呢 一直以來都是非常的優秀. (20) [Subtitle]: 很清爽 然後配上它的生菜 脆脆的 這一盒. (21) [Subtitle]: 這一個只要36元. (22) [Subtitle]: 你不覺得太划算了吧. (23) [Subtitle]: 趕快分享給 早上要吃三明治的朋友 自己買 好划算.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator in a blue/red hat, 1 female friend in a maroon top appearing at home.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The main woman wears a blue fuzzy bucket hat initially, then a red Kangol hat at home. She wears a white long-sleeved shirt and a denim-style overall.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Starts in a Costco supermarket with refrigerated display cases. Transitions to a domestic indoor living room with a dining table and soft lighting.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-energy female narration delivered at a fast pace with a bright, enthusiastic tone. The pitch is notably high with significant variability. A high-tempo electronic BGM with a steady 4/4 drum machine beat plays consistently in the background. The acoustic environment has a slight room resonance of a large store. (2) A sharp 'ding' sound effect triggers a transition. The speaker's volume increases as she emphasizes the price and rarity of the item. The BGM maintains its upbeat tempo, providing a rhythmic backdrop to her rapid speech. The vocal delivery is clear and professionally projected. (3) A playful 'pop' sound effect occurs. A second female voice is heard briefly in agreement with low volume. The primary speaker's tone shifts to a more descriptive, evaluative mode, though the arousal remains high. The BGM continues without interruption, blending well with the vocals. (4) Another 'ding' stinger SFX emphasizes a specific point about the food's quality. The two women's voices overlap slightly as they express enjoyment. The BGM reaches a peak in dynamism. The incidental noise is minimal, with high tonal clarity and a studio-like focus. (5) A final 'whoosh' and 'pop' SFX sequence concludes the review. The vocal delivery ends with a cheerful rising intonation, urging viewers to try the product. The BGM is cut abruptly to silence at the end of the video timeline.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Location Context -> Product Showcase -> Sensory Review -> Price Value -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To review a newly released Costco sandwich platter, specifically highlighting the abundance of meat floss filling and the overall value for money to influence viewers to purchase it.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses typical social media food blogging techniques like high-arousal narration, frequent jump cuts, and bold text overlays to maintain engagement.
